Concerning the First House 77
Chart No. 33.—Born on 31-10-1910 at 1-41 p.m.
(I.S.T.) Lot. 13" N., Long. 5h. 10m. 20s. E.
Balance of Mars Dasa at birth : Years 5-10-17.
aspirations, is capable of much endeavour, industrious but
lacks self-confidence, is nervous and weak-minded. The
concentration of six planets in one sign should be carefully
noted.
Kumbha or Aquarius
The subject has an uncouth and repelling appearance.
Lagna is powerfully aspected by Saturn and Mars. In the
Navamsa Pisces rises which is again aspected by Saturn
and Mercury. On account of Navamsa Lagna, he is stout
and of middle stature. Except for the physical features, the
horoscope is not interesting otherwise. It will be seen that
Lagna is middling in strength and lord of Lagna and the
Sun are rather weak.
Chart No. 35 is the horoscope of a fortunate but self-
made man. Though Lagna is hemmed in between Ketu and
Saturn indicating an unsteady career, it is free from any
